_triage_note: TRIAGE-OWNED FIXTURE — NOT end-to-end suite proof. This is a hand-authored copy of the journeys.json v2 shape codebase-health CH-02 emits (manifest_journey_id backref; CH-02 shipped 2026-07-05, ADR 0029). The triage correlation consumes such an artifact only when --journeys supplies one — a prod-triage run typically has none, and then the backref cross-check reports status=skipped with the honest reason. This fixture exercises the provided-journeys paths hermetically; a real cross-check reads the artifact an actual audit run produced.
